theme: Hardening AgentOps' repo-native .agents operating surface into an auditable, operator-friendly control plane across contracts, CLI inspection and linting, hooks, Codex runtime proof, and validation gates.
ranking_basis: Fix observed command failures from subdirectories before adding new diagnostics.
Improve failure evidence before adding wider smoke coverage.
Keep local hash-gate tuning independent from CLI and lint work.
Write docs after implementation behavior is stable.

ranked_work.title: Refactor ao agents path resolution to repo-root aware helpers
ranked_work.rationale: Observed from cli/: default inspect and lint paths fail, and explicit contract inspection misses active skills.

ranked_work.title: Enhance .agents write-surface lint with source-location evidence
ranked_work.rationale: Current lint reports undocumented subdirs but does not show where references were found.

ranked_work.title: Stabilize agents-hub content-hash gate for concurrent local agents
ranked_work.rationale: Local shared-agent state can make the fast gate noisy or slow, while CI must remain strict.

ranked_work.title: Add ao agents doctor diagnostic summary
ranked_work.rationale: Doctor should compose stable repo-root-aware inspect and lint behavior.

ranked_work.title: Add smoke coverage for documented .agents surface references
ranked_work.rationale: Smoke coverage should build on richer source-location evidence.

ranked_work.title: Update .agents operator docs for doctor, lint evidence, and hash-gate triage
ranked_work.rationale: Docs should describe implemented behavior, not intended behavior.
